title: 2018 Press Releases

source.name: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System

summary: This is a listing page containing approximately 50+ individual Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2018, including FOMC statements, minutes, regulatory actions, enforcement actions, and banking application approvals. The page is historical (2018) and mixes macro-relevant items (FOMC decisions, projections) with non-macro content (enforcement actions, community development announcements). Individual press releases should be accessed separately for detailed analysis.
key_points: This is a listing page (listing_page type), not an individual archiveable document per CORE RULE 6.
The page contains 2018 FOMC statements (12/19/2018, 11/8/2018) and FOMC minutes (11/29/2018, 10/23/2018) which are macro catalyst items.
Economic projections from the December 18-19, 2018 FOMC meeting were released 12/19/2018.
Source is 8+ years old relative to TODAY (2026-03-31), making it a historical record with stale relevance for current macro catalysts.
Most items on the page are regulatory/enforcement content (Volcker rule proposals, CECL accounting, enforcement actions, banking applications) not relevant to macro catalysts.
Individual press releases must be extracted and accessed separately for proper archival and analysis.
why_it_matters: This listing page aggregates Federal Reserve communications from 2018 but is not itself a research-ready source. Analysts seeking macro catalyst information should access individual FOMC statements, minutes, and economic projections directly rather than relying on this index page.
macro_context: The listing includes several macro-relevant items from 2018: December FOMC statement raising rates to 2.25-2.50%, November FOMC statement, associated minutes, and December economic projections (SEP/dot plot). However, these items are not analyzable from this listing page and require direct access to individual press releases.
market_structure_context: Some items relate to banking regulation (Volcker rule proposals, CECL accounting standard phase-in, supervisory stress test framework) which could affect market structure, but this listing page does not provide the detail needed for analysis.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per explicit metadata classification - per CORE RULE 6, listing pages must be rejected
Source is over 7 years old (2018) relative to TODAY (2026-03-31), making it stale for current macro catalyst analysis
Mixed content: many items (enforcement actions, banking applications, CRA announcements) are not macro catalyst relevant
Listing page provides no substantive content to archive - individual press releases must be accessed separately
Cannot assess market impact, directional bias, or detailed macro context from an index page
event_type set to 'unknown' which is technically correct for listing pages but indicates this should not be archived as a record
